title: Health plan datasets: Small businesses (SHOP)
meta-description: Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP) health plan datasets for researchers
bite: You can download data for the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP) available to businesses in states where the federal government is operating the SHOP Marketplace.
excerpt: You can download data for the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP) available to businesses in states where the federal government is operating the SHOP Marketplace.
content:
You can download data for the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP) available to businesses in states where the federal government is operating the SHOP Marketplace. States not included in the data found below run their own SHOP Marketplaces.

2026 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 1.06 MB)
2026 instructions (PDF, 195 KB)

2025 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 1.58 MB)
2025 instructions (PDF, 181 KB)

2024 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 2.3 MB)
2024 instructions (PDF, 163 KB)

2023 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 2.5 MB)
2023 instructions (PDF, 162 KB)

2022 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 2.5 MB)
2022 instructions (PDF, 158 KB)

2021 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 3.0 MB)
2021 instructions (PDF, 182 KB)

2020 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 2.3 MB)
2020 instructions (PDF, 159 KB)

2019 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 4.0 MB)
2019 instructions (PDF, 182 KB)

2018 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 5.6 MB)
2018 instructions (PDF, 131 KB)

2017 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 13.8 MB)
2017 instructions (PDF, 146 KB)

2016 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 18.9 MB)
2016 instructions (PDF, 75 KB)

2015 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 20.9 MB)
2015 instructions (PDF, 107 KB)

2015 plan information is also available for:

  • Nevada (ZIP file, 89.1 KB)

2014 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 20.7 MB)
2014 instructions (PDF, 107 KB)

2014 plan information is also available for:

  • Idaho (ZIP file, 611 KB)

More resources for:

Researchers
Get more detailed plan information with Health Insurance Marketplace® Public Use Files. These files provide extensive data on the plans available to consumers through the Federally-facilitated Marketplace.

Developers
Access additional dataset files. Get HealthCare.gov data on individual and small group medical and dental plans, as well as Marketplace-certified local help and community provider lists.

Individuals & families
Preview plans & prices before you apply for health coverage.

Small businesses/employers
Preview SHOP plans & prices for small businesses.
